title: Claude Fable 5: The New AI That Changes Everything! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof announces Claude Fable 5.0 as a distinct AI model separate from Opus. The video highlights a capability called Know Your Agent (KYA) and its implications for the AI landscape.
